title: Constitution Graph
description: Generated, denormalized view of the entire ADR set as a graph. Produced by 'iil-adrfw build'. Consumers (adr_query, adr_audit, adr_diff) read this rather than re-parsing markdown each call.

source_revision.description: Git commit SHA of the ADR repository at generation time. Critical for reproducibility.

source_root.description: Absolute or repo-relative path to the adrs/ directory.

concept_index.description: Inverted index: concept token -> list of ADR ids mentioning it. Built from rationale + rule titles + extracted noun phrases.

domain_index.description: Domain tag -> list of ADRs covering it.

active_rule_count.description: Number of rules currently in force (status accepted/experimental, valid_to null or future).

open_questions.description: Auto-detected gaps where the constitution has no opinion. Surfaced by adr_query when no ADR matches.

id.description: Globally unique node id. ADR nodes use ADR-id; concept nodes use 'concept:slug'.

data.description: Kind-specific payload. ADR nodes embed full frontmatter; rule nodes embed compiled checker; concept nodes carry text + embedding ref.

position_hint.description: Optional layout hint for visualization tools (D3, Cytoscape).

kind.description: Edge semantics. 'implies' and 'co-occurs-with' are inferred, not declared.

weight.description: For inferred edges (implies, co-occurs-with): strength of inference. Declared edges always have weight=1.

since.description: When this edge became active. Edges can come and go as ADRs are added/superseded.

score.description: Overall constitutional health. Composite of dimensions below.

internal_consistency.description: 1.0 = no detected conflicts among accepted ADRs

coverage.description: 1.0 = every active domain has at least one ADR

freshness.description: 1.0 = all ADRs reviewed within their cadence

supersession_hygiene.description: 1.0 = no dangling 'supersedes' references and no orphaned superseded ADRs

evidence.description: Why we think this is unanswered: 'mentioned-in-3-issues', 'queried-via-adr_query-7-times', 'audit-detected-divergent-implementations'.

candidate_authors.description: Suggested deciders based on related ADR ownership.
